About Anirah Advisory

We Are on a Mission to Grow Every Business

We are a consultancy committed to growth and essential business services. From launching startups to scaling established businesses, we serve entrepreneurs at every stage. Our team of experienced professionals brings deep expertise in company registration, government certifications, funding schemes, and ongoing compliance management.

With a combined experience of 40+ years, our team has helped thousands of businesses navigate the complexities of the Indian business landscape. We understand the challenges entrepreneurs face and provide practical, affordable solutions that deliver real results.

Today, with over 5,000 projects executed and 1,950+ Google reviews at 4.7/5 rating, we have grown into one of India's most trusted business consultancy platforms. Our presence spans 36+ states, supported by a dedicated team of 50+ professionals who bring deep domain expertise and an unwavering commitment to client success.

Our Mission

To make Anirah Advisory the most reliable business consultancy in India. We aim to help startups, MSMEs, and entrepreneurs by giving them smart, simple, and affordable business solutions. Whether it's company registration, compliance, funding help, or government certification — we want to make every process easy and stress-free for our clients.

Our Vision

To support Indian businesses in building a strong and successful future. We want to see more startups and MSMEs grow confidently, knowing they have expert support at every step. By offering clear advice, honest guidance, and the latest tools — our vision is to become the first choice for startups and MSMEs across India.

Our Promise

Transparent pricing, honest guidance, and no hidden charges. We are a consultancy service provider and we deliver what we promise. If we cannot help you, we will tell you upfront.

Our Core Values

Client First

Every decision we make starts with what is best for our clients. Your business growth is our priority, and we treat every client with the dedication and attention they deserve.

Result Driven

We measure our success by the results we deliver for our clients. Whether it is company registration, certification, or funding — our team is relentlessly focused on timely and successful outcomes.

Integrity

We maintain the highest standards of transparency and honesty. No hidden fees, no false promises — just genuine expertise, straightforward guidance, and honest business consultancy.

Collaboration

We work hand-in-hand with entrepreneurs, government bodies, and industry partners to build lasting relationships that drive sustainable business growth and success.

Our Services

End-to-End Business Solutions

From registration to compliance, legal protection to government grants — organized across 7 lifecycle stages for your business growth.

AARAMBH

Company Registration & Incorporation

Launch your business with the right legal structure. We handle end-to-end company registration, from choosing the right entity to getting your PAN, TAN, and GST sorted from day one.

KAVACH

Legal Protection & IP

Safeguard your business with expert legal advisory covering contracts, intellectual property, labour law compliance, and dispute resolution to protect what you build.

PRAMANIT

Certifications & Compliance

Earn trust and unlock opportunities with industry-recognized certifications. From ISO to MSME, we help you meet quality standards and compliance requirements effortlessly.

NIDHI

Government Grants & Funding

Access government-backed grants, subsidies, and seed funding designed for MSMEs and startups. We navigate the paperwork so you can focus on growth.

VIKAS

Business Loans & Capital

Fuel your expansion with collateral-free and secured business loans from ₹5 Lakhs to ₹10 Crores. Competitive rates, flexible terms, and fast disbursement.

VISTAR

Brand Building & Growth

Scale your business with strategic consulting covering market research, digital transformation, revenue optimization, and go-to-market planning for sustainable growth.

PRABANDHIT

Compliance Management

Stay compliant year-round with automated filings, annual returns, tax audits, and regulatory updates. We handle the complexity so your business stays penalty-free.

Not sure which service is right for you? Talk to our expert advisors.

Schedule Free Consultation

How It Works

Simple 4-Step Process

From eligibility check to application completion, our streamlined process makes business services simple and hassle-free.

STEP 01

Eligibility Check

We assess your business profile, industry type, and requirements to determine the best services and schemes you qualify for.

STEP 02

Payment

Choose from our transparent pricing packages. Pay securely online with no hidden charges.

STEP 03

Documentation

Our team helps you prepare and organize all necessary documents, ensuring your application is complete and accurate.

STEP 04

Application

We file your application with the relevant authorities and follow up until completion, keeping you informed at every stage.

Why Choose Us

Built for Your Success

We combine expertise, transparency, and commitment to deliver an unparalleled business consultancy experience that puts your success first.

Fast Processing

Our streamlined processes and strong institutional relationships enable quick service delivery. Most registrations are completed within 7-10 working days, and funding applications are processed efficiently through our dedicated team and established connections.

Transparent Pricing

Complete transparency is at the core of our business philosophy. We provide clear, upfront pricing with zero hidden charges. Every cost is explained before you commit, ensuring you get maximum value from our consultancy services.

Expert Team

Our team comprises experienced consultants, CAs, CSs, and legal professionals with deep domain expertise. From initial consultation to final delivery, a dedicated advisor guides you through every step with personalized attention.

Pan India Service

We serve businesses across all 36+ states and union territories in India. Most of our services can be handled completely online, and our team has in-depth knowledge of state-specific regulations and requirements.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions about our business registration, certification, funding assistance, and compliance services.

We offer comprehensive business registration services including Private Limited Company, Limited Liability Partnership (LLP), One Person Company (OPC), Partnership Firm, Section 8 Company (Non-Profit), and 12A/80G Registration for NGOs and trusts. Our team handles the entire process from document preparation to certificate issuance, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free experience. Each business structure has different compliance requirements and tax implications, and our consultants will guide you to choose the most suitable option based on your business goals and industry.

The timeline varies depending on the type of registration. A Private Limited Company registration typically takes 3-7 working days from the date of complete document submission. LLP registration takes 5-10 working days. One Person Company registration is completed in 7-10 working days. Section 8 Company registration may take 10-15 working days due to additional approval requirements. Our team works proactively to expedite the process and keeps you informed at every stage. Most registrations are completed well within the standard timelines.

Startup India/DPIIT recognition is a certification provided by the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT) to eligible startups. Benefits include 100% tax exemption under Section 80 IAC for 3 consecutive years, access to the Fund of Funds managed by SIDBI, self-certification for compliance, easier patent and trademark filing with 80% fee rebate, and eligibility for various government grants including the Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS). We help you with the complete application process, documentation, and follow-up with the authorities.

We assist with a wide range of government and industry certifications including Startup India/DPIIT Recognition, ISO Certification (9001, 14001, 22000, 27001, 45001), FSSAI Food License, GST Registration, Import Export Code (IEC), NSIC Registration, Udyam Registration (MSME), GeM Registration (Government e-Marketplace), Trademark Registration, and Patent Filing. Each certification has specific requirements and our experienced team ensures your application meets all criteria for quick approval.

Yes, we provide comprehensive funding and loan assistance. We help businesses access government-backed schemes like CGTMSE (collateral-free loans up to ₹5 Crore), PMEGP (subsidy up to 35%), MUDRA/PMMMY (up to ₹20 Lakh), SIDBI schemes, and various state-level subsidy programs. For startups, we facilitate access to Seed Support Scheme, SISFS (Startup India Seed Fund), angel investor networks, and venture capital connections. Our team prepares business plans, financial projections, and handles the complete application process with banks and financial institutions.

We believe in complete transparency. Our consultancy fees are clearly communicated upfront before you engage with us. There are no hidden charges or surprise costs at any stage of the process. Our pricing is competitive and aligned with industry standards. We offer flexible payment options and for many services, you can pay in installments. We also provide a free initial consultation where our experts assess your requirements and recommend suitable options. Our goal is to deliver maximum value at affordable rates.

Yes, we serve businesses across all 36+ states and union territories in India. Most of our services can be handled completely online through our digital platform, making the process convenient regardless of your location. We have in-depth knowledge of state-specific regulations, tax benefits, and compliance requirements. Whether you are in a metro city or a tier-2/tier-3 town, you get the same quality of service and expertise. Our team has successfully delivered projects for clients from Ahmedabad, Chennai, Mumbai, Delhi, Bengaluru, and numerous other cities.

We offer comprehensive compliance management services including ROC Annual Filing (AOC-4, MGT-7), GST Monthly/Quarterly Filing and Annual Returns, Income Tax Filing for businesses (ITR-6, ITR-5), TDS/TCS Returns, PF and ESI Compliance, Professional Tax Registration and Filing, Trademark Renewal, and Statutory Audit Support. Our dedicated compliance team ensures you never miss a deadline and stay compliant with all regulatory requirements. We also offer annual compliance packages for businesses that want hassle-free, year-round support.

Still have questions? Talk to our experts
